away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Chennedy Carter
players.injury_comment: Carter has played well this season, though she's in danger of missing her fourth straight game Thursday. If Carter can't get back on the floor, Jewell Loyd should soak up most of the minutes from the bench, with Kierstan Bell likely to see a little more action.

players.name: Dana Evans
players.injury_comment: Evans has yet to make her season debut and remains without a timetable for a return due to a left leg injury. She can be considered doubtful for future contests until the Aces offer an update on her progress.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Carla Leite
players.injury_comment: Leite hasn't missed a game since the 83-82 win over Connecticut on May 18, though that streak could come to an end Thursday. If Leite is not available, Holly Winterburn could be in line to make her second start of the 2026 campaign.
